title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. kerneri
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. kerneri, also known as Woodland Eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia officinalis plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. The plant is rich in flavonoids, iridoids, and other bioactive compounds that possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. kerneri have been traditionally used to treat eye problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved vision, and enhanced immune function. Euphrasia officinalis subsp. kerneri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile natural remedy for maintaining overall health and well-being.
